note: true_label/expected_argmax_index is the ground-truth digit for this sample from the dataset itself -- this is what a correctly trained model should output as argmax(logits), regardless of exact weight values. reference_model_* below is from a quick sklearn MLP(32,16) trained separately just to confirm the sample is easy to classify -- it is NOT the model you will build/export, so don't expect your logits to match it exactly.
